name: ioquake3
description:
This Docker will download and install ioquake3 Server (You have to copy your pak0.pk3 file from your game directory to your server).

PK3 Files: After the container started the first time you have to copy your pak0.pk3 file from your Quake III Arena directory into your server directory: .../.q3a/baseq3/ (i strongly recommend you to place all your pak*.pk3 files into it) after that simply restart the container to start the server.

WEB CONSOLE: You can connect to the ioquake3 console by opening your browser and go to HOSTIP:9029 (eg: 192.168.1.1:9029) or click on WebUI on the Docker page within Unraid.

ports.name: UDP - Game Port
ports.description: Game Port (If you want to change the game port please click on more settings here in the template, change the port, then delete this entry and create a new one with the corresponding port number and UDP only!).

ports.name: TCP - WebConsole
ports.description: WebConsole (by default, you can connect to the ioquake3 console by opening your browser and go to HOSTIP:9021 - eg: 192.168.1.1:9029 - or click on WebUI on the Docker page within Unraid).

variables.name: GAME_PARAMS
variables.description: The startup parameters for the server (only change if you know what you are doing!)

variables.name: Q3_MAP
variables.description: The initial map wich the server would start.

variables.name: ioquake3 Download URL
variables.description: Only change if you know what you're doing!

variables.name: Patch URL
variables.description: Only change if you know what you're doing!
